criteria_checked.note: Decision-complete: exact banner string, exact section title, exact insertion anchors re-confirmed empirically — handoff between 'Fail-closed checklist (STOP + report)' (L44) and 'Anti-token-max reminder' (L49), both present and adjacent; no pre-existing no-subagent section (grep=0). Minor carry-over: memo anchor 'directly after the intro line' targets a wrapped 2-physical-line paragraph (memo L3-4); banner lands after L4. Non-blocking.

B1 RESOLVED. All live body greps are case-insensitive (`grep -ci 'fresh'|'STOP'|'source of truth'`, L135; `grep -c 'Art. VIII'` is intentionally exact for a proper-noun token the body writes verbatim). The only remaining literal `grep 'fresh'` (L207) is the historical revision note describing the r1 blocker, not an executable AC. Every AC grep is satisfiable by a faithful build: banner carries 'Status update (2026-07-09'/'PENDING'; '32,490 bytes' survives at memo L7 and 'emitted twice' survives at risk-#6 L60 (the two preservation greps genuinely span BOTH stale blocks — verified: L7 bolds '**twice**' so 'emitted twice' matches only the un-bolded L60). Additive-only check precise ('no `-` lines except the `---` file header'). A faithful implementation cannot spuriously trip its own fail-closed verifier.

All grounded facts re-verified 2026-07-09 from scratch: memo UNTRACKED (git status `??`); AGENTS.md = 24,126 B (not 32,490); stale claims confirmed at memo L7 ('32,490 bytes') and risk #6 L60 ('32,490 B', 'printed twice'/'emitted twice'); branch = claude/dmc-fable-core; run status = RUN-NO-ACTIVE; selftest 15/0 + 4/0 green; linkcheck clean (24 files). Rev 2 revision notes (L206-212) match the present plan text — all four r1 items (B1 case-insensitivity, additive phrasing, risk-#6 grep, staging warning) are verifiably folded; no silent extra changes detectable (plan is untracked so no committed Rev1 to diff, but internal consistency holds).

Both edit targets exist. scope-guard.sh evidence+verification exemption confirmed (_within '.harness/evidence' / '.harness/verification' → exit 0, L160-165). Constitution Art. VIII escalation duty verbatim ('the weaker the maintainer, the smaller the permitted step and the sooner the escalation', DMC_CONSTITUTION.md L213). roles.json critic-falsifier = 'fresh context', may_mutate false (L46-50); verifier may_mutate false (L66-70). Handoff IS in linkcheck's scanned set (dmc-orchestration-linkcheck.py:60), so the new section's any verb/path/role refs are gated by the required AC3 linkcheck — a genuine strength, not a risk.

Envelope ratification recorded this session; 'docs-only cannot move selftest' holds (floor green now, plans not enumerated by selftest/linkcheck). Untracked→tracked memo: additive git-diff is inapplicable to a new file, so content-presence greps are the correct preservation proxy — acceptable for this file class.

2-file mutation scope well-pinned; records paths scope-exempt. ADVISORY (optional): the tree now also carries untracked `.harness/plans/dmc-fable-core-d-runmetrics.md` (Cycle D plan) in addition to ` M .codex/config.toml`. T003's staging warning names only `.codex/config.toml`; the 'targeted `git add <path>` only, never -A/-u/.' rule plus AC4's name-only==approved-set check already exclude d-runmetrics, so there is no actual hole — but the warning could name d-runmetrics too for belt-and-suspenders.

Docs-only, no secrets, no migration, no enforcement-class landmark touched (security lens applied but not schema-mandatory). ADVISORY (optional, disclosure lens): the memo carries internal product codenames (Product-A / Product-B / Product-C on 14 lines) and candid strategic prose; this repo is publicly published (README.md, LICENSE, docs/index.html present, Pages live). Tracking the memo THIS cycle is LOCAL-only, so nothing is published now — the local-commit ceiling correctly defers publication to the separate human push gate. Recommend the plan flag, for that push-gate reviewer, that this content becomes public on merge to main so the disclosure is consciously ratified. Does not block the local-commit cycle this plan authorizes.

LOCAL-only commits on dedicated branch claude/dmc-fable-core, no push — trivially reversible via git. Two consecutive critic REJECTs halt the cycle per the envelope. Inherent though not spelled out as an explicit rollback step.
